title: Realms Unleashed
description: Fantasy Multiplayer 1.20.1 Modpack for Realms Unleashed Server
body:
1.20.1 Fantasy Multiplayer Clientside Modpack 


This Modpack is being used on the Realms Unleashed server, to access please join our [Discord](https://discord.gg/JsvKeV5Jar).

Message me on discord if you are interested in the server side Modpack.

Please report any bugs or feedback for the Modpack to [#mods-discussion](https://discord.com/channels/772565752581980161/1188966869944778792)

# Custom Dungeons and Story
we have been working on this server since June 2023 creating dungeons, boss fights, story, datapacks and modpacks to create the best server we can. We are a small community always looking for new friends.

At the end of the day we only create all this in hopes of making something fun for our friends to enjoy! <3

## The Garden of Hope
